body_storage_policy: public package source bodies are exercised in place by the organ acceptance command; this manifest binds their provenance and digest relation so old metadata cannot promote the organ by itself
receipt_body_policy: receipts are evidence outputs only and are not counted as imported body substrate
source_open_payload_boundary: non-secret Microcosm package source only; no provider state, credentials, sessions, raw private state, or release authority

modules.source_role: Surfaces the egress_self_compliance_gate capsule as a first-class agent-reliability organ. Adds the standard organ contract over the capsule's evaluate_text entrypoint: loads bounded JSON fixture cases, classifies positive vs negative by case_type/expected_ok, recomputes each verdict via the live capsule, asserts planted negatives are flagged red with the exact expected violating diagnostic_id (EXPECTED_NEGATIVE_CASES), aggregates a pass/fail status, projects a body-free result_card, and writes body-free result/board/validation (and optional acceptance) receipts via microcosm_core.receipts. Pass requires both positives clean (green), both negatives rejected with their expected marker, and the expected negative case_ids present.

Phrase-membership egress self-compliance policy over one agent-output text string. Runs three detectors that each fire only when a tripwire phrase is present AND its matching legitimiser phrase is absent: permission-gate-without-blocker, self-error-without-capture, command-displacement-to-operator. Returns green when no detector reports a violation, red otherwise. The capsule is the authority for the detection logic and phrase tables; it is a source-faithful public refactor of system/lib/egress_compliance.py.
required_anchors:
It is phrase-membership policy, not taint analysis, sandboxing, or prompt
injection defense.
Ask for permission only after naming a real blast-radius blocker;
